name: Auditing Configuration Changes on Linux Host
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Mikhail Larin, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Auditing Configuration Changes on Linux Host
SIGMA Description: Detect changes in auditd configuration files

False positives:
- Legitimate administrative activity

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%path%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/etc/audit/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/etc/libaudit.conf%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/etc/audisp/%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Auditing Configuration Changes on Linux Host on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%path%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/etc/audit/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/etc/libaudit.conf%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/etc/audisp/%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Auditing Configuration Changes on Linux Host

Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: Mikhail Larin, oscd.community SIGMA Title: Auditing Configuration Changes on Linux Host SIGMA Description: Detect changes in auditd configuration files  False positives: - Legitimate administrative activity  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
